text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "reg.exe is used to establish persistence by setting the UserInitMprLogonScript registry key to execute a batch file from the temporary directory at logon.",
  "indicators": [
    "reg.exe",
    "HKCU\\Environment\\UserInitMprLogonScript",
    "persistence",
    "C:\\Users\\wardog\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\art.bat",
    "temp directory",
    ".bat file"
  ]
}
